name: Sarah Johnson
summary: Full-stack software engineer with 5 years of experience building scalable web applications. Specialized in React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about clean code and user experience.

responsibilities: Led development of real-time collaboration features using WebSockets and Redis
Architected microservices infrastructure on AWS (ECS, Lambda, API Gateway)
Mentored 3 junior developers and conducted code reviews
Reduced API response time by 60% through database query optimization
Built customer-facing dashboard using React and Material-UI
Developed RESTful APIs with Express.js and MongoDB
Implemented CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: Open Source Contribution - React Query
projects.description: Contributed bug fixes and documentation improvements

projects.name: Personal Project - DevTracker
projects.description: Built a productivity tracking app for developers with GitHub integration

parsed_text: Sarah Johnson is a Full-stack software engineer with 5 years of experience. Currently Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp Inc where she leads real-time collaboration features development and has reduced API response time by 60%. Previously worked at StartupXYZ as Full Stack Developer. Strong skills in React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS, and Docker. Berkeley CS grad with AWS and MongoDB certifications.
